jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at FreshToHome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, FreshToHome in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FreshToHome:
FreshToHome is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome!
